nasb.text: For when they came up from Egypt, and Israel went through the wilderness to the Red Sea and came to Kadesh,

esv.text: but when they came up from Egypt, Israel went through the wilderness to the Red Sea and came to Kadesh.

cnv.text: 以色列人從埃及上來的時候，是走過曠野到紅海，到了加低斯；

ccb.text: 当年以色列人离开埃及，经旷野渡过红海来到加低斯，
